name: iaiops
summary: Governed, vendor-neutral OT data tap + intelligent troubleshooting for AI agents (OPC-UA / Modbus / S7comm / Mitsubishi MC / MTConnect / MQTT-Sparkplug / EtherNet-IP / EtherCAT / SECS-GEM / PROFINET / IEC-104 / DNP3 / IEC-61850 / BACnet) with a built-in governance harness (audit, budget, risk tiers, MOC), an AI downtime root-cause copilot, plus OEE, downtime, and asset-inventory analytics
